description: Style NoteThis lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun Fridays at work. Product DetailsRound toed shoe with central lace-ups and perforations on the midfoot regionPadded tongue and innerTough rubber midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves and terraced lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
